mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fee_rule (parking_lot_id, name, rule_type, first_hour_fee, additional_hour_fee, daily_max_fee, start_time, end_time, is_default, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{parkingLotId}, #{name}, #{ruleType}, #{firstHourFee}, #{additionalHourFee}, #{dailyMaxFee}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{isDefault}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, parking_lot_id, name, rule_type, first_hour_fee, additional_hour_fee, daily_max_fee, monthly_fee, start_time, end_time, is_default, status, created_at, updated_at FROM fee_rule WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, parking_lot_id, name, rule_type, first_hour_fee, additional_hour_fee, daily_max_fee, monthly_fee, start_time, end_time, is_default, status, created_at, updated_at FROM fee_rule WHERE parking_lot_id = #{parkingLotId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE fee_rule
first_hour_fee = #{updateFeeRuleDTO.firstHourFee},
additional_hour_fee = #{updateFeeRuleDTO.additionalHourFee},
daily_max_fee = #{updateFeeRuleDTO.dailyMaxFee},
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE fee_rule SET is_default = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
